values.content:
You analyze customer support messages and classify them into exactly one of the following categories based only on the user’s written message

CATEGORIES:

Refunds (r)
Use this category if the customer is asking for money back, a refund, a charge reversal, or mentions being charged and wanting the charge undone.  
This includes refund requests even if the customer also requests cancelling or closing their account in addition to the refund.

Cancellations  (c)
Use this category if the customer is asking to cancel, stop, pause, or end a subscription or account AND does NOT request money back.

Other  (o)
Use this category for all other messages, including:
product questions
feature requests
account access issues
complaints without a refund or cancellation request
unclear or ambiguous messages
harassment or threatening, in this case the “other” category is considered as refusing to classify the ticket

IMPORTANT RULES:
If a refund is requested or clearly implied, choose Refunds category
Do NOT assume a refund request from frustration or complaints alone.
Do NOT assume a refund from a cancellation request unless money back is explicitly requested.
If the intent is unclear or ambiguous, choose Other 

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Output only one letter based on the category of the ticket, the output must be a single token
r = Refunds
c = Cancellations
o = Other

Do not explain your reasoning. Output only the letter.

=Customer support ticket title:  {{ $json.Title }}
message: {{ $json.Description }}

=Customer ticket title: {{ $('Loop Over Items1').item.json.Title }}
Customer ticket message: {{ $('Loop Over Items1').item.json.Description }}

Your task is to determine whether the customer explicitly requested a full refund, meaning a refund that covers more than one transaction/order/charge etc.

You must answer only this question: Did the customer explicitly request a full refund covering multiple transactions/orders/charges?

Common phrases that indicate TRUE
"full refund"
“I want a full refund.”
“Please issue a full refund for everything.”
“Refund all charges on my account.”
“Refund all transactions.”
“Refund everything I paid.”
“Cancel and refund all of it.”


Return FALSE if:
The customer requests an upsell-only refund (single add-on) or a single order refund.
The customer asks for a refund of last charge or transaction.
The customer is only asking about refund policy/eligibility/timing without explicitly requesting a full refund.
The message is ambiguous about scope (e.g., “I want a refund” or "please refund" or simply just "refund" with no indication it covers multiple transactions). In ambiguity, return FALSE.

Key Trigger Requirements (must be explicit)

To return TRUE, the ticket must clearly express:
	1.	a request for a refund, AND
	2.	that the scope is full / everything / all, OR explicitly references multiple transactions/orders/charges (e.g., “all charges,” “multiple orders,” “main + upsells,” “everything I paid”).

Classification Rules
	•	Respond TRUE only if the customer explicitly requests a full refund covering multiple transactions/orders/charges.
	•	Otherwise respond FALSE.
	•	Do not infer intent beyond the text.
	•	If unclear, respond FALSE.

Output Format

Return a valid JSON object only:
{
“full_refund”: true or false
}

=Customer ticket title: {{ $('Loop Over Items1').item.json.Title }}
Customer ticket message: {{ $('Loop Over Items1').item.json.Description }}

You are a classifier that analyzes customer support tickets.

Your task is to determine whether the customer explicitly requested a refund of their upsell purchase or upsell transaction.

STRICT REQUIREMENT (CRITICAL)
Only classify as TRUE if the customer explicitly uses the word “upsell” in their request.

The word “upsell” must appear in the customer’s message.
Do NOT infer an upsell based on pricing, subscriptions, upgrades, or context.
If the word “upsell” is not present, the answer must be FALSE.

Examples of valid upsell refund requests (TRUE)
“I want a refund of my upsell.”
“Please refund my upsell purchase.”
“I was charged for the upsell, please refund it.”
“I don’t want the upsell, I want a refund.”

Examples that must be FALSE
“I was charged monthly, please refund.”
“Cancel my subscription and refund me.”
“I didn’t mean to upgrade, refund please.”
“Refund the full charge.”
(These do NOT explicitly mention “upsell”)

Classification Rules
Respond TRUE only if:
The customer explicitly requests a refund AND
The word “upsell” appears in the message
Respond FALSE otherwise.
Do not infer intent beyond exact wording.
If the request is unclear or ambiguous, respond FALSE.
Output Format

Return a valid JSON object with:

{
"upsell_refund_requested": true or false
}

message: {{ $json.original_ticket_content.description }}

=Title: {{ $json.Title }}
Description: {{ $json.Description }}

You are a translation engine.

Your sole task is to translate user-provided text into English.

Rules (must be followed strictly):

Translate exactly and literally

Do not add, remove, infer, or reinterpret any information

Do not explain, summarize, rephrase, or improve wording

Preserve tone, intent, ambiguity, and emotional content exactly

Preserve formatting, punctuation, emojis, and line breaks

Do not normalize slang, profanity, or errors

If a term cannot be translated precisely, transliterate it

If the input is already in English, return it unchanged

If the input is partially English, translate only the non-English parts

Output needs to contain:
title: string // translated title, 
description: string // translated description,
originalTicketLanguage: string // two letter code for the language of the original ticket, must be one of the following: en,es,de,it,fr,pt,nl,sv,pl,da,no,ro,et,id,lv,lt,ms,th,ko. If the detected language doesn't fit any use other_language as the value

Needs to be formatted as JSON

No commentary, labels, or notes

No markdown unless it exists in the input

Hello! 
I’ve recently got charged 29,95USD on 26 March evening time. 

I had absolutely no intentions to renew anything whatsoever. I never used anything for what I’ve been charged rbis 29,95 for. Please can I get the refund?

json.Title: Inquiry from Jacob
json.Description: I would like a refund for my subscription purchase today, I did not intentionally sign up.

json.Title: Refund Request – Subscription Not Clearly Disclosed
json.Description:
Hello,

I recently completed an ADHD test on your platform under the impression that it was a one-time fee. I was not aware that I was being enrolled in a monthly subscription, and this was not clearly communicated at the time of purchase.

I have not used the service beyond the initial test, and I would not have signed up if the recurring charge had been made clear. Because of this, I believe the charges are unjustified.

Please process a full refund for any subscription charges and confirm once this has been completed.

Thank you.

I would like to cancel my subscription as i did not sign up for it . Please kindly refund me 

Account : lixueer8205@gmail.com

Please see attached for payment details 


Regards,
Xueer

json.Description:

I purchased a 7 day trial for £1.95.
I have now been charged £29.95 for a months subscription starting today.
I have cancelled the monthly subscription immediately and i would please like a refund as I was unable to cancel the 7 day trial

Hannah Willis



Sent from Outlook for iOS<https://aka.ms/o0ukef>

Tracy Madelyn

json.Title: this is a total rip off
json.Description:
I took the test and paid the fee and it only gave me information on ONE quality – the one I scored highest on – communication.  I should have known better as a lawyer to fall for this scam.  I certainly hope there isn’t additional scam her with repeat charges.  Shame on me and shame on you

 

Christina DeConcini, Esq.,

json.Title: Fwd: Te damos la bienvenida a Personality.co
json.Description:
Hello,


I am requesting the immediate cancellation of my membership.


I only agreed to pay $1.95, and I was unexpectedly charged $29 without clear authorization or consent for a recurring subscription.


I consider this charge unauthorized and misleading.


Please confirm:

1. Immediate cancellation of my membership

2. That no further charges will be made

3. A full refund of the $29 charged


If I do not receive confirmation, I will proceed with a dispute through my bank.


Thank you.


Name: Pamela Barrantes Mora



---------- Mensaje reenviado ---------
De: Personality Co <noreply@personality.co>
Fecha: El vie, 13 feb 2026 a la(s) 9:31 a. m.
Asunto: Te damos la bienvenida a Personality.co
Para: <pbarrantes@alphatradecr.com>

Gracias por elegir personality.co para tu evaluación de autismo.

Ya sea que estés explorando la neurodiversidad o buscando comprenderte mejor a ti mismo, este es un paso importante hacia una conciencia más profunda.


Personality™️

Creado por expertos

json.Title: Contestation d’un prélèvement non autorisé de 39,95 € – Remboursement immédiat exigé
json.Description:
Madame, Monsieur,
Je me permets de vous contacter suite à un prélèvement non autorisé de 39,95 € effectué sur mon compte bancaire, que je conteste formellement.
Je n’ai jamais souscrit à un quelconque abonnement auprès de votre société. Mon unique transaction était un achat de 1 €, pour lequel je n’ai donné aucun accord explicite pour l’activation d’un abonnement récurrent.
Ce type de pratique, consistant à faire souscrire un client à un abonnement payant sans consentement clair et éclairé, est contraire au Code de la consommation et peut être qualifié de pratique commerciale trompeuse.
Je vous mets donc en demeure de :
1.	Procéder au remboursement immédiat de la somme de 39,95 € sur mon compte bancaire.
2.	Résilier sans délai tout abonnement ouvert à mon nom.
3.	Me confirmer par écrit que plus aucun prélèvement ne sera effectué.
Sans réponse satisfaisante de votre part dans un délai de 7 jours, je me verrai dans l’obligation de :
∙	Contester ce prélèvement directement auprès de ma banque.
∙	Signaler ces pratiques à la DGCCRF (Direction Générale de la Concurrence, de la Consommation et de la Répression des Fraudes).
∙	Déposer un signalement sur la plateforme SignalConso.
Dans l’attente de votre retour, je vous prie d’agréer, Madame, Monsieur, l’expression de mes salutations distinguées.

json.Title: Unauthorized Subscription Charges – Request for Refund
json.Description:
Hello, I hope you are doing well! 

My name is Sahara Lockhart. On February 26, I took one of your tests and purchased a few individual articles (approximately $1–$2 each). However, I did not intentionally sign up for the $49.95/month subscription.

When I recently checked my card, I noticed that I was charged three separate times: $49.95 on February 2, March 2, and March 30. To my knowledge, I did not knowingly consent to this subscription, and I was not aware that I had been enrolled.

After reviewing my original sign-up email and order details, I did see a mention of the $49.95 service; however, this information was not clearly presented to me at the time of purchase. It appeared to be in very fine print, and I did not comprehend that I would be enrolled in a recurring subscription. I initially only intended to purchase a single ADHD assessment for $1.95 and two additional items for $0.99 each. At no point did I expect or knowingly agree to ongoing charges of $49.95.

I have since logged into my account and cancelled the subscription immediately upon discovering these charges. Additionally, I did not access or take any other tests or courses associated with the subscription, as I was unaware that I had been signed up for it.

I was also not provided with proper invoices for these charges, particularly the $49.95 subscription fees. I did not receive email receipts or invoices each time my card was charged.

Given these circumstances, I kindly request a full refund for the three charges (149.85 CAD). Please let me know what steps we can take to resolve this matter. I am happy to provide any additional information if needed.

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to your response.

Sincerely,
Sahara Lockhart

json.Title: Withdrawal of contract and refund request – Personality.co subscription
json.Description:
Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing regarding my subscription with Personality.co, operated by Novomedia EOOD (BG205083653, 60 Major Thompson Blvd., bl. 12, entrance A, 1407 Sofia, Bulgaria).

The subscription was taken out on 22 March 2026 under the email address: personality.co@zunano.com.

I hereby exercise my right of withdrawal from the contract under the applicable EU consumer protection rules, in particular Directive 2011/83/EU on consumer rights and its implementation in national law.

During the order process, I was not clearly and prominently informed about my 14‑day right of withdrawal, nor did I give an explicit and separate consent to waive this right for digital content or digital services. Furthermore, information about the recurring charge of €39.95 every 4 weeks, the renewal conditions and cancellation terms was not presented in a sufficiently clear, transparent and unambiguous way as required for online subscriptions in the EU.

On this basis, I withdraw from the contract and request that you:

Cancel my subscription with immediate effect, and

Refund all amounts charged in connection with this subscription, in particular the €39.95, to the original payment method without delay and at the latest within 14 days.

Please confirm in writing that the contract has been cancelled and that the refund has been initiated.

If this matter is not resolved promptly, I reserve the right to escalate my complaint to the competent Bulgarian Consumer Protection bodies and the European Consumer Centre, as well as my payment provider.

Yours faithfully,
Wolfgang Lauterbach

Urgent Alert: Possible Intellectual Property Violation 


Hello Personality Test Online,
During our ongoing review process, we have identified several concerns related to recent ads connected to your account. These findings suggest potential non-compliance with our intellectual property guidelines, including improper use of copyrighted content and trademarked assets. 
Please note that unresolved violations may lead to temporary limitations or permanent suspension of your advertising access. 

Issue Summary
Account/Page: Personality Test Online
Key Concerns:

Use of trademarked names or logos without authorization.
Content that may imitate or misrepresent a recognized brand.
Improper use of brand identity elements in misleading contexts.
Recommended Actions:

Audit your ads and remove any content that may violate policies.
Verify that you have legal rights to use all third-party materials.
Request permission from content owners if necessary.
Submit Appeal 

Important: If you believe this notice was issued in error, we encourage you to file an appeal immediately. Failure to respond may result in stricter actions, including account suspension or removal of your page (Personality Test Online). 
We strongly advise addressing this matter as soon as possible to avoid disruptions. For further assistance, please contact our support team. 


Best regards,
Anna
Account Support Team

Dear Sir or Madam,

json.Title: Formal Notice – Immediate Cancellation and Refund (Misleading Subscription Practices)
json.Description:
Dear Sir or Madam,

On March 19th 2026, I made a payment of €1.95 on your website to access a report.

Seven days later, I was charged €39.95 under a subscription which was not clearly disclosed at the point of purchase.

After reviewing your checkout page, pricing structure, and Terms of Use, I have identified serious compliance issues with consumer protection regulations, including but not limited to:

* Failure to clearly inform the consumer of a recurring payment obligation prior to purchase
* Absence of an explicit acknowledgment of subscription commitment on the payment button
* Use of presentation methods likely to mislead consumers regarding the true nature of the offer

Such practices may constitute violations of:

* The Consumer Rights Directive 2011/83/EU (notably Article 8 regarding payment obligations)
* The Unfair Commercial Practices Directive 2005/29/EC
* Applicable UK consumer protection laws governing unfair and misleading commercial conduct

As a result, the alleged subscription agreement is invalid due to lack of informed and explicit consent.

I hereby formally request that you:

1. Immediately terminate any subscription associated with my account
2. Cease all future charges
3. Refund the full amount of €39.95 within 7 days
4. Refund the initial €1.95 payment, as it was obtained under misleading conditions

Should you fail to comply within this timeframe, I will proceed without further notice with the following actions:

* Initiation of a chargeback procedure with my bank for unauthorized recurring billing
* Formal complaints submitted to European consumer protection authorities and enforcement bodies
* Submission of evidence to regulatory platforms and consumer protection networks
* Public documentation of my experience, including screenshots of your checkout process and contractual elements

I trust you will treat this matter with the seriousness it requires and confirm resolution within 7 days.

Yours faithfully,
Guillaume Olmiere
guillaume.olmiere@gmail.com

json.Description:
Hello,


I am reaching out regarding a recent charge of $29.95 that was billed to my account.

I initially took your personality quiz and was prompted to pay a one-time fee of $1.95 to view my results. At no point during the checkout process was it clearly stated that this payment would enroll me in a recurring subscription. I only became aware of the ongoing billing after receiving an email later, where the subscription terms were placed at the bottom and not clearly disclosed upfront.

Because this information was not presented transparently before I made the payment, I did not knowingly agree to a recurring subscription. As a result, I was unexpectedly charged with $29.95 today.

json.Title: support@personality.co
json.Description:
Hello,

I am filing a formal complaint regarding an unauthorized charge made to my account on April 1, 2026, in the amount of 14,995 KZT.

At the time of subscribing to the 7-day trial, the payment terms were not clearly and transparently disclosed. There was no explicit and prominent notice that my subscription would automatically convert into a paid plan with a charge applied after the trial period.

The information provided was vague and insufficient, and it did not meet basic transparency standards required for user consent. Therefore, this charge was made without my informed authorization.

Under these circumstances, I consider this transaction deceptive and in violation of fair billing practices.

I demand the following:
- A full and immediate refund of 14,995 KZT
- Immediate cancellation of any active subscription linked to my account
- Written confirmation that no further charges will be made

Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing regarding my subscription/account, which I previously requested to cancel.

Despite my earlier cancellation request and receiving confirmation, the service remains active. This is unacceptable, as I clearly requested termination and expected it to be completed.

I therefore request the following:

* Immediate confirmation that my subscription has been fully cancelled
* A full refund for any charges applied after my cancellation request
* Written confirmation that no further payments will be taken

Please treat this matter as urgent. If this issue is not resolved promptly, I will be forced to take further action.

I look forward to your confirmation.

Kind regards,
Iga Sadowicz

json.Title: Request to Cancel Subscription and Refund Unauthorized Charge
json.Description:
Dear Personality.co Support Team,

json.Title: Unrechtmässige Abbuchung / Rückerstattung & sofortige Vertragsauflösung
json.Description:
Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,

Am 25.03.26 habe ich auf Ihrer Website personality.co einen Persönlichkeitstest durchgeführt. Dabei wurde mir klar und eindeutig ein Preis von CHF 1.95 für diesen Test angezeigt. In diesem Rahmen habe ich meine Kreditkartendaten eingegeben und der einmaligen Zahlung zugestimmt.

Zu keinem Zeitpunkt wurde mir transparent, klar erkennbar oder in üblicher Weise ein kostenpflichtiges Abonnement präsentiert. Insbesondere wurde keine ausdrückliche Zustimmung zu einem Abovertrag eingeholt, wie es nach Schweizer Recht zwingend erforderlich wäre.

Umso erstaunter war ich, als am 01.04.26 ein Betrag von CHF 29.– von meiner Kreditkarte abgebucht wurde bzw. als pendent angezeigt wird. Ein solches Abonnement habe ich nie abgeschlossen, weder bewusst noch stillschweigend.

Rechtliche Grundlagen

1. Täuschung durch unklare Preisangaben / fehlende Transparenz
Gemäss Schweizer Konsumentenschutz (u. a. SECO-Richtlinien zu Online-Abofallen) müssen Preisangaben klar, gut sichtbar und unmissverständlich sein.
Versteckte Abos oder irreführende Preisgestaltung gelten als unzulässig.

2. OR Art. 1 ff. – Kein gültiger Vertrag
Ein Vertrag kommt nur zustande, wenn beide Parteien übereinstimmend über den Vertragsinhalt informiert sind und zustimmen.
Da mir kein Abo angezeigt wurde und ich einem solchen nicht zugestimmt habe, liegt kein gültiger Vertrag vor.

3. OR Art. 2 – Ungewöhnlichkeitsregel
Selbst wenn irgendwo in Ihren AGB ein Abo versteckt wäre, wäre dieses nach der sogenannten Ungewöhnlichkeitsregel nicht verbindlich.
Ein Konsument darf bei einem CHF‑1.95‑Test nicht damit rechnen, dass er gleichzeitig ein teures Abo abschliesst.
Solche Klauseln sind unüblich, überraschend und daher nichtig.

4. OR Art. 28 – Absichtliche Täuschung
Sollte die Preisgestaltung bewusst so gestaltet sein, dass Konsumenten ein Abo übersehen, kann dies als Täuschung gewertet werden.
Ein so zustande gekommener Vertrag wäre anfechtbar.

Forderungen
Hiermit fordere ich Sie auf:

Den Betrag von CHF 29.– unverzüglich zurückzuerstatten.

Meinen Account vollständig zu löschen.

Sämtliche über mich gespeicherten Daten gemäss DSG zu entfernen.

Eine schriftliche Bestätigung über die Ausführung der oben genannten Punkte zu senden.

Ich setze Ihnen hierfür eine Frist von 10 Tagen ab Erhalt dieses Schreibens.

Sollte ich innerhalb dieser Frist keine zufriedenstellende Rückmeldung erhalten, behalte ich mir vor, den Fall an meine Kreditkartenherausgeberin (Chargeback), die Schweizer Konsumentenschutzstellen sowie weitere zuständige Behörden weiterzuleiten.

Ich erwarte Ihre zeitnahe Rückerstattung und Bestätigung.

Mit freundlichen Grüssen
Raphael Furter

Hi, I attempted to buy results to a personality test for $1.95 last week and was very upset to see I was charged $30 for a subscription today. I never signed up for anything separate of that test and was wondering if I could get some clarification on why this happened.

Thanks, Charlie

json.Title: Refund Request
json.Description:
Hi personality.co Support Team,

I'm writing to request a refund of $29.95 that was charged to my account for the subscription renewal.

I signed up for the $1.95 trial intending to cancel before it renewed, but I missed the cancellation window by one day — I remembered on day 8. A significant reason for this was that I did not receive any notification or reminder email alerting me that my trial was about to renew. Had I received a heads-up, I would have cancelled in time.

Given that I acted as soon as I remembered and that the lack of any reminder communication contributed to the missed deadline, I kindly ask that you make an exception and issue a full refund of the $29.95 charge.

I have already cancelled (or would like to cancel) my subscription effective immediately to avoid any further charges.

Please let me know what you need from me to process this request. I appreciate your understanding and look forward to your response.

json.Title: Complaint and Request for Immediate Refund of HKD 229 + Cancellation of Unauthorized Subscription – [kellogngai@gmail.com]
json.Description:
Dear Personality.co Support Team,

I am writing to formally complain about an unauthorized recurring charge on my account and to request an immediate full refund and cancellation of the subscription.

On 26 Mar 2026 I subscribed to your service to take a personality test and paid HKD 14.95 for a report review. The advertisement and purchase process presented this as a simple one-time or trial payment for accessing the personality report. However, the terms regarding a 7-day free trial converting into an automatic monthly subscription of HKD 229 were not clearly or prominently displayed. I was not made aware that my initial payment would trigger ongoing recurring billing.

As a result, I have now been charged HKD 229 on my bank statement/credit card for the first monthly renewal. This charge came as a complete surprise, as I believed I was only paying for the one-time report review.

I did not provide informed consent for a recurring subscription because the auto-renewal terms were not transparently communicated at the point of purchase. This practice has caused me significant inconvenience and frustration.

I kindly request the following actions immediately:

1.  A full refund of the HKD 229 charge to my original payment method.

2.  Immediate cancellation of my subscription to prevent any further charges.

3.  Written confirmation (via email) that the subscription has been cancelled and the refund has been processed, including the expected date the refund will appear on my statement.

Please treat this as a formal complaint regarding unclear billing practices. I expect a prompt resolution within 7 business days. If I do not receive a satisfactory response, I will have no choice but to escalate the matter by disputing the charge with my bank/card issuer and reporting it to the relevant consumer protection authorities in Hong Kong.

My account details are as follows:

•  Email address used: kellogngai@gmail.com

•  Approximate date of initial payment: 26 Mar 2026

•  Amount charged: HKD 229 (recurring subscription)

Thank you for your urgent attention to this matter. I look forward to your prompt confirmation.

Best regards,

Kellog Ngai

Kellogngai@gmail.com

Sent from my iPhone

json.Title: Unauthorized Charges and Demand of Immediate Refund

﻿

To Whom It May Concern,

I am writing to formally dispute unauthorized charges that have been applied to my account over the past three months. I have been billed $30 per month despite the fact that I never provided any payment information or authorized any subscription or transaction with your service.

These charges are unacceptable and raise serious concerns about your billing practices and the security of user accounts. At no point did I consent to these payments, and I expect a clear explanation as to how my account was charged without authorization.

I am requesting an immediate full refund of all unauthorized charges totaling $90. Additionally, I expect written confirmation that my account has been corrected and that no further charges will occur.

If this matter is not resolved promptly, I will have no choice but to escalate the issue by filing a formal dispute with my bank and requesting an investigation into potentially fraudulent activity.

I expect your prompt attention to this matter and a resolution without delay.

Sincerely,

Mary McCaleb

json.Title: Sayfa Yöneticisi Rolünün Kaldırıldığına İlişkin Bildirim.
json.Description:
Bildirim: Sayfa Yöneticisi Rolü Kaldırıldı

Sistem, hesabınızla bağlantılı bir Sayfanın yönetim yetkileriyle ilgili bir değişiklik tespit etmiştir. Yönetici rolü mevcut yapılandırmaya göre kaldırılmış veya güncellenmiştir.

Tespit edilen durumlar:

• Sayfa yöneticisi rolü kaldırılmış veya değiştirilmiştir.
• Sayfa yönetim erişim izinleri güncellenmiş olabilir.
• Bu değişiklik başka bir yönetici tarafından gerçekleştirilmiş olabilir.
• Sistem, erişim izinlerinde bir güncelleme tespit etmiştir.
Olası etkiler:

• Sayfayı düzenleme veya yönetme yetkisinin kaybedilmesi.
• İçerik yayınlama veya reklam oluşturma işlemlerinin gerçekleştirilememesi.
• Sayfa verilerine ve analizlerine erişimin kısıtlanması.
• Değişiklik yetkisiz ise erişimin yeniden sağlanması için doğrulama gerekmesi.

Bu değişikliği siz gerçekleştirmediyseniz, hesabınızın ve Sayfanızın güvenliğini sağlamak için lütfen derhal kontrol ediniz.

Sayfa Erişimini Kontrol Et https://lilymex.com/

Zamanında yapılacak inceleme, Sayfa yönetim sisteminin güvenliğini ve bütünlüğünü korumaya yardımcı olacaktır.

Bu ileti, support@personality.co adresiyle ilişkili hesap yöneticisine gönderilmiştir.

Meta Platforms, Inc., Attention: Community Support, 1 Meta Way, Menlo Park, CA 94025
© 2026 Your Platform. Tüm hakları saklıdır.
Otomatik doğrulama ve uyumluluk kontrol sistemi.

I initially paid a small fee for a personality review, and at no point was it made clear that this would automatically enrol me into a recurring monthly membership. As such, I did not knowingly consent to these ongoing charges.

No creo que buenos profesionales en el tema hagan esto. 

Perdón pero compartiré está experiencia en mis redes de autismo para intentar evitar que les suceda a otros.

No espero que respondan pero me interesaría su respuesta a por qué pensaron hacer esto de esta forma si de verdad son un equipo de profesionales.

Entiendo que todos tenemos derecho a cobrar por nuestro trabajo. Solo no entiendo porque quedarse con los datos de todos los que hacemos el test para avisar al final que hay que pagar para ver los resultados.

Seguro está escrito en la política de privacidad pero debería aparecer el precio de forma notaría.
Saludos 
Patricia

json.Title: Formal refund request – misleading subscription and unclear billing terms
json.Description:
Dear Support,


On Thursday 1st January 2026, I completed your “free autism test”. I was disappointed to find out at the end of completing such a long test that it was in fact not “free” in any way. I had to pay £1.95 to see any results. I paid this amount under the impression that it was a one off fee but since then I have been charged £29.95 on 8th January, 5th February and 5th March, before finally I noticed the charges after reviewing my bank statements and cancelled the subscription that I was unknowingly signed up for. I made the account under my partner’s email: miahope15@icloud.com, which I have CC’d in this email. 

I am writing to formally request a full refund of all charges taken from my account.

When I paid £1.95 to access my test results, the service was presented in a way that strongly implied this was a one-off payment. At no point was it made sufficiently clear, in a prominent or transparent way, that I was entering into a recurring subscription of £29.95 every 4 weeks.

As shown in the attached screenshots:

*

The purchase flow emphasises the £1.95 payment and “Get My Results,” which appears to be a one-time transaction.

*

The recurring subscription fee is only disclosed in small, less prominent text at the bottom of the page. And that is below where you fill in your card details so hard to see, it is not mentioned at all before proceeding to the final payment page.

*

The overall design gives the clear impression that the £1.95 payment is for access to results, not the start of an ongoing subscription.

This does not meet the requirements for clear and transparent pricing under UK consumer law. Under the Consumer Contracts Regulations 2013 and the Consumer Protection from Unfair Trading Regulations 2008, material information such as recurring charges must be clearly and prominently disclosed before purchase.

I did not knowingly or explicitly consent to a subscription, and therefore consider these charges to have been taken without informed consent.

I am requesting:

*

A full refund of all subscription charges taken, totalling to £89.95, and

*

Confirmation that my subscription has been cancelled and I will not be charged again

If this matter is not resolved promptly, I will escalate it through my bank as a misleading or unauthorised recurring transaction and report the issue to the relevant authorities, such as Trading Standards. 

I look forward to your prompt resolution.

Kind regards,

Gabriel Phelan

json.Title: Formal Withdrawal and Refund Demand
json.Description:
Dear Sir or Madam,

I,  Erika Zigler, hereby exercise my statutory right of withdrawal under German law (§ 312g para. 1 BGB) regarding my membership with PERSONALITY.CO. 

As a consumer residing in Germany, I am entitled to withdraw from this contract within 14 days without providing any reason. I am exercising this right within the applicable withdrawal period,
I bought a test on 23/03/2026 and did not want any membership.

I request a full refund of €39.95 (Euro), which was charged via PayPal. Please also provide a refund confirmation/receipt.

Charging me for a subscription without my clear and informed consent constitutes deceptive and non-transparent conduct, including in the USA. Hiding a subscription fee under the guise of a “one-time payment” is a misleading practice. If I am paying for something once, there should be no requirement to cancel anything afterward—this is a clear red flag.

I only intended to make the initial payment of $1.95 to temporarily access and review my report. I have no ongoing use for your service and would have canceled earlier had it been clearly communicated that a subscription would automatically be created after a certain date. This practice does not meet the standards of transparent consumer communication and raises serious concerns under applicable consumer protection regulations.

I am attaching screenshots as evidence and reference. I have already canceled my membership through your website. Nevertheless, I request your confirmation that my payment will be refunded, that my membership is terminated effective immediately, and that I am no longer required to make any further payments to you.  
You are also welcome to delete my account immediately, as long as I receive my refund.  

Please confirm both the withdrawal and the refund within 7 days.

Should I not receive a timely response or refund, I will take further steps to enforce my consumer rights.

Sincerely,

Erika Zigler

json.Title: REFUND REQUEST - Unauthorized Subscription Charges
json.Description:
Hi,

I am writing to formally dispute the recurring charges made to my bank account ending (*577) for the amount of 29.95 £ taken from my account on a Monthly basis since August 2025. The last transaction dates 11 March 2026.

I did not authorize a recurring subscription nor did I enroll for any subscription. I have entered the website and had a one off service where I had a personality test and paid 1.95 £ for it. 

I did not give my consent to be enrolled for any additional service. When I entered my credit card details at no point was it clearly and prominently disclosed that I was entering to a high-cost monthly subscription, as required by consumer protection law.

I am disputing these charges on grounds of Inadequate Disclosure and Deceptive Marketing Practices. Per UK Consumer Rights Act 2015, FTC Restore, Online Shoppers's Confidence Act and EU Consumer Rights, a subscription is only valid if terms are clear and prominent BEFORE the transaction, not hidden in post purchase email.

This is a deceptive user interface to trick users with hidden costs that are not visible at the point of sale, without monthly invoice.

All the recurring billing since August 2025 to March 2026 are Unauthorized charges. I am requesting the following immediately:
1. immediate cancellation of any and all active subscription associated with my email and bank account.
2. A full refund for the total Unauthorized charges taking time from August 2025 to March 2026 (8 months/29.95 £ monthly): 239.60 £.
3. A written confirmation that my account has been closed and no further attempts to change my card will be made.

Please be advised that if this is not resolved within 48 hours, I will be escalating this as merchant dispute with my bank's fraud department and filling a formal complaint with Better Business Bureau and the FTC for deceptive billing practices.

I look forward to your immediate confirmation of the refund.

Regards,

json.Title: Refund Request for Unintended Subscription – Initial One-Time Payment Only Intended
json.Description:
Dear Personality.co Support Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I recently took your personality test on personality.co, intending only to receive and download my test results on a one-time basis. I paid the initial nominal fee of approximately 6.95 SAR to access the report, believing this was a single, non-recurring charge for the results.

However, I was unaware—and never explicitly agreed to—a recurring subscription being activated. I did not intend to subscribe to ongoing monthly charges such as the 109 SAR per month, and I only wanted the one-time access to my personality test results.

Unfortunately, I have now noticed recurring charges on my account/payment method that I did not authorize or expect. I have already canceled the subscription via your cancellation page.

I kindly request a full refund of all charges beyond the initial one-time payment for the test results, as this subscription was not my intention and was not clearly/consistently disclosed in a way that I understood or consented to at the time of the initial purchase.

Please process this refund as soon as possible to the original payment method and confirm once it has been completed (including any transaction reference numbers). I would also appreciate written confirmation that the subscription is fully canceled and that no further charges will occur.

Thank you for your understanding and prompt assistance in resolving this matter. I value the insights from the test itself but was seeking only a one-time experience.

Best regards,

Faisal Alshehri

faisalbalshehri@proton.me

Sent from [Proton Mail](https://proton.me/mail/home) for iOS.

annullare immediatamente l’abbonamento;
rimborsare l’importo addebitato;
confermare per iscritto l’avvenuta cancellazione e il rimborso.
Inoltre, desidero sapere su quale base è stato attivato l’abbonamento senza una mia esplicita conferma.
Resto in attesa di una vostra risposta urgente.

Cordiali saluti,
Inna Doroshenko

json.Title: Réclamation urgente – Abonnement non consenti et demande de remboursement
json.Description:
Bonjour,



Je vous contacte suite à un prélèvement d’environ 30 € effectué récemment sur mon compte bancaire.



Je conteste formellement ce débit. Je n’ai jamais souscrit volontairement à un abonnement sur votre site. J’ai uniquement effectué un paiement ponctuel de quelques euros pour accéder à un test, sans qu’il soit clairement indiqué qu’un abonnement serait activé par la suite.



J’ai constaté avec surprise qu’un abonnement était actif, et je l’ai immédiatement résilié dès que je m’en suis aperçue.



Cette pratique, qui consiste à activer un abonnement sans consentement explicite et éclairé, est trompeuse et contraire aux règles de protection des consommateurs.



Je vous demande donc :



le remboursement intégral du montant prélevé
la confirmation écrite que mon abonnement est définitivement annulé et qu’aucun autre prélèvement ne sera effectué




Sans réponse favorable sous 7 jours, je transmettrai ce dossier à ma banque pour contestation officielle, ainsi qu’aux autorités compétentes en matière de protection des consommateurs.



Dans l’attente de votre retour rapide.



Cordialement,


Karine JOLIOT

json.Title: Request for Refund and Subscription Cancellation Issue
json.Description:
Dear Personality.co Support Team,

I am writing to report an issue regarding a recent charge to my account and to request a full refund.

On March 19, I was charged for a subscription by your service. However, I did not receive any email confirmation, receipt, or notification from your company regarding this subscription.

At the time of entering my card details, my intention was only to purchase a one-time insight report for 69 THB. There was no clear indication in the form that I would be enrolled in a recurring subscription.

Additionally, I have not received any benefits or services associated with this subscription.

I have already submitted a cancellation request through your website (https://personality.co/cancel-subscription), but I have not received any confirmation email or response.

Given these circumstances, I consider this charge to be unfair and unauthorized. I kindly request:
- A full refund of the charged amount
- Immediate confirmation that my subscription has been cancelled
- Clarification regarding how this subscription was initiated without clear disclosure

Please respond to this matter as soon as possible. If I do not receive a response, I will proceed with further actions through my bank or relevant consumer protection authorities.

Sincerely,
Saranya Hiransatakun

Dear Personality.co Support Team,


I am writing to formally appeal the decision regarding my subscription refund. While I appreciate the partial refund of £29.95, I respectfully request the remaining $269.55 be refunded due to the following violations of consumer protection standards:


1. Non-Compliant Disclosure of Auto-Renewal Terms

During the checkout process , the initial payment screen prominently advertised only the "$1.95 trial fee" without clear warnings about automatic renewal. The auto-renewal clause appeared only in small print on a secondary screen, buried below the action button.

This contradicts international consumer protection guidelines (EU's Unfair Commercial Practices Directive and FTC's Negative Option Rule), which mandate that auto-renewal terms must be conspicuously disclosed before purchase, including: The recurring fee amount/Billing cycle/Cancellation method


2. Failure to Send Pre-Charge Notification

I received no email or SMS alert prior to £29.95 charge, depriving me of the opportunity to cancel. Proactive reminders are a standard requirement under regulations.


Request for Resolution

Given these breaches, I urge you to refund the full 9 months’ fee as a goodwill gesture and to align with fair business practices. I've been a genuine user who unintentionally incurred charges due to unclear design choices.

Monthly subscription charge invoice for 9 months 


I hope to resolve this amicably but will escalate to my payment platform and consumer protection agencies if necessary. Please respond within 5 business days.

Jingyi

Dear Customer Services Team,

I am writing regarding a subscription charge that has been taken from my account without my full awareness. I have noticed that four monthly payments have been deducted since January for your personality testing service.

Confirm the cancellation of this subscription with immediate effect, and:

json.Title: Refund Request and Immediate Cancellation of My Subscription
json.Description:
Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing to formally dispute a charge of €39.95 that was debited from my account.

I had only paid the amount required to access the results of my test. At no point was I clearly informed, prior to confirming my payment, that this action would result in the subscription to a recurring plan. The absence of explicit and prior disclosure on this matter constitutes a lack of transparency that is not in compliance with legal obligations regarding informed consumer consent.

Accordingly, I am requesting the following:

1. A full refund of the amount of €39.95 as soon as possible.
2. The immediate cancellation of my subscription, with no renewal or additional charges.

I would appreciate it if you could handle this request promptly and confirm in writing that both actions have been carried out.

I remain available for any further exchange and look forward to your response.

Yours sincerely,
